characters.description: A Fusing Archon, caravan mage, and protector who studies the consumption of magical harvests. She relies on Kit for dimensional storage and tests gravity-driven tungsten projectiles whose destructive force can exceed her safeguards.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: Tala's bonded dimensional storage item. A projectile experiment damages its interior equipment and doorway and drains its reserves, but it remains functional after Tala replenishes it.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: An archivist who examines isolated Culinary Guild records and finds that fear and secrecy kept them apart from the guild's broader knowledge. She takes responsibility for raising the problem with local leadership.
characters.name: Ingrid

characters.description: Tala's friend, housemate, and fellow Caravan Guild mage. She helps Tala establish a permanent doorway site for Kit, listens when Tala discusses her family history, and encourages her to confront the unresolved separation.
characters.name: Lynn

characters.description: Tala's intelligent creature companion, whose appetite is comparable to Tala's unusually high food needs.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: A mage working at the teleportation tower who helped Tala after her arrival from the academy. Nearing retirement without advancing, she expects eventually to undergo an involuntary transformation into a fount.
characters.name: Teleportation-tower mage

characters.description: The Bandfast city lord's reforged wife and an Archon able to intervene through the city's defenses. She helps when Tala's iron body paint causes those defenses to mistake Tala for an intruder.
characters.name: Jenna

characters.description: Tala's distinct mental aspect and archive-linked collaborator. Alat reconstructs suppressed memories that expose an apparent attack upon Tala's mind and helps her organize what the recovered experience means.
characters.name: Alat

characters.description: A hostile conceptual being seen in Tala's recovered memories. It manipulates attention and belief, attempts to penetrate or erase Tala's mind, and destroys her short-term memories before withdrawing.
characters.name: Blood-eyed arcane

characters.description: A newly graduated information-processing mageling and one of Tala's former academy acquaintances. Lynn meets her in Bandfast and considers taking her on as a mageling and housemate.
characters.name: Kannis

characters.description: An exacting inscriber who reviews Kannis's proposed inscriptions, corrects serious weaknesses, and records the improvements. She also agrees to monitor Tala's continuing magical compression while Tala remains in Bandfast.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: An elite mundane combatant whose magic is devoted to exceptional reactions. He repeatedly defeats Tala and other mages at close range, then recommends mounted coordination and weapon practice for Tala and Terry.
characters.name: Guard captain

characters.description: A fellow caravan mage whose working relationship with Tala is becoming less formal. Tala grants him access to the memories she recovered so he can understand the danger facing her.
characters.name: Rain

characters.description: A magical adviser whom Tala authorizes to review her recovered memories.
characters.name: Mistress Odara

characters.description: An Archon hunter with precise control over iron dust. He accepts Tala's public invitation to join a northern ending-berry expedition that is also intended to draw out the being that altered her memories.
characters.name: Mage hunter

characters.description: A caravan leader and iron-magic specialist traveling with Tala toward Marliweather. She has learned to direct magic through the empty spaces within iron, an approach that advances her work without yet producing an Iron Archon Star.
characters.name: Caravan overseer

characters.description: Tala's eleven-year-old younger brother and a pre-magic candidate with unusually high gate throughput. He remembers her only faintly, fears she may disappear again, and brings her toward the family home after accepting her reassurance.
characters.name: Nalac

characters.description: A bound material-guide healer based at the Carwheel family alchemy shop. Formerly a wildlands healer, he recognizes Tala as the missing eldest sibling and sees that she is an exceptionally advanced human Archon nearing fusion.
characters.name: Leighis

characters.description: Tala's eldest sister, a registered alchemist and central worker in the family's expanded alchemy business. She meets Tala at the shop during the difficult first reunion with the family.
characters.name: Tala's eldest sister

characters.description: A Marliweather Constructionist Guild paragon with fire, force, and magical-power orientations. He recognizes Tala as the Blood Archon and advises her to let her newly Fused state settle fully before she attempts refining.
characters.name: Master Hoffest
